title: justicia enarthrocoma
intro: Justicia enarthrocoma, also known as the Yellow Bells or Mexican Honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species in the Acanthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Justicia enarthrocoma is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or added to infusions.
